ques: Check Los Angeles Lakers Stats 2023-24, calculate Anthony Davis' games played (GP) percentage, tell me if there are other players with the same games played percentage as Anthony Davis.
answer: Anthony Davis played 76 of 82 games in 2023-24, a GP percentage of ~92.7% (76/82 ≈ 92.68%). Yes — one other Laker matches it: D'Angelo Russell also played 76 games (92.7%).
